title: MAGIC
overview: Popee attempts to practice the sawing-in-half trick on an unwilling Kedamono. Surprisingly, it's successful. At least, until Popee tries to put him back together...

title: LIMBO
overview: Popee tries to limbo. After becoming frustrated with his lack of success, he has Kedamono give it a go, who is very good at it. Jealous, Popee increases the difficulty.

title: ACROBATICS
overview: While performing acrobatics on a barrel, Popee becomes stuck inside. Kedamono tries to help as things get worse.

title: KNIFE THROWER
overview: After catching Kedamono sneaking around to practice knife throwing, Popee forces him to practice...as his target.

title: FIRE BREATHER
overview: Popee, while performing fire-breathing for Kedamono, accidentally causes a UFO to crash. Alien's first appearance.

title: PANTOMIME
overview: Popee becomes irate after Kedamono's ability to pantomime nearly runs him over.

title: KARATE SHOW
overview: Popee demonstrates his karate skills and attempts to rescue Kedamono's birthday cake from a Frog. Frog's first appearance.

title: FIRE RING
overview: Popee tries to get Kedamono to jump through a ring of fire.

title: MIMIC
overview: Popee puts on a gorilla mask made by Kedamono. Kedamono is horrified as Popee starts acting like an actual gorilla and must stop him from getting further out of control.

title: GUNMAN
overview: While practicing trick shots with a shotgun, Kedamono and Popee must stop a stray bullet.

title: SWALLOWER
overview: Popee demonstrates his talent for sword swallowing and becomes over-zealous, resulting in disaster.

title: ESCAPE SHOW
overview: Popee tries an escape act.

title: DANCE
overview: After an accident while dancing, Popee's eyes fall out and Kedamono accidentally breaks them. After Popee can't find his eyes, Kedamono tries to help him find a replacement.

title: GREAT MAGIC
overview: During another attempt at sawing Kedamono in half, Popee is stopped by the arrival of an older clown, who shows them a more advanced technique. Papi and Paola's first appearance.

title: GREAT MAGIC
overview: Popee and Kedamono get lost in the desert while chasing a vision.

title: STOP THE GUN
overview: After an incident involving the bullet catch trick, Kedamono has to travel through time to fix things.

title: POISON
overview: Jealous after seeing Kedamono's superior athletic abilities, Popee finds a scorpion. Unfortunately (for everyone), his actions come back to bite him.

title: ELEPHANT
overview: Popee dreams of riding Paola. After being rejected, Popee tries to persuade her, and prove that he's not a bad person.

title: DREAM
overview: Popee and Kedamono fall unconscious and get trapped in a dream, which quickly becomes a nightmare.

title: HYPNOTISM
overview: Papi and Popee try to hypnotize each other. Things go awry.

title: SUPER STRENGTH
overview: Popee and Papi engage in a strength contest. Who will win? How far will they go to prove themselves? A cautionary tale about drugs.

title: PREDICTION
overview: Through a crystal ball, Papi shows Kedamono a prediction about Popee's future. Envious of what the prediction entails, Kedamono tries to switch with him.

title: GHOST
overview: After dying, Popee comes back to haunt those responsible for his death.

title: MEDICINE
overview: Papi and Kedamono try to concoct a medicine for a very ill Popee. Or...something like that.

title: SAMURAI
overview: Papi and Popee come to a stalemate during a sword match. Meanwhile, Kedamono is really hungry.

title: MONOCYCLE
overview: Popee shows off on a unicycle and goes a bit too far.

title: KNIFE GAME
overview: While trying to impress Papi with the knife game, Popee ends up cutting shapes out of the table. Delighted by Papi's reaction, Popee keeps playing, only to become confused when Papi becomes angry.

title: ALIEN
overview: When Kedamono and Popee can't do a trick, Papi asks Alien to try.

title: DARK SIDE
overview: Papi cuts the sun in half, shrouding half of the world in darkness.

title: VS GOD
overview: Popee challenges God.

title: SLEEP
overview: After removing his eyelids in order to perfect the robot, Popee finds he is unable to sleep.

title: IN THE MIND
overview: Popee and Papi discover that they will get something from Kedamono if they knock him out.

title: MIRROR
overview: Popee and Kedamono discover an alternate universe through a mirror.

title: OPENING
overview: Popee, Kedamono, and Papi try to create the perfect opening.

title: MY CAR
overview: Popee wants a car. Deterred from the cost of buying one, he tries creating one himself.

title: ERASER
overview: Kedamono discovers an eraser. Soon after he discovers the eraser holds magical properties, he is chased by Popee, who has the intent of sawing him in half.

title: LONELINESS
overview: Popee is left alone in the desert.

title: TIME
overview: In the middle of the events of "Vs God", Kedamono finds a stopwatch that controls time.

title: FACE
overview: Popee becomes curious about what Kedamono looks like under the mask.
